title: koeleria brevis
intro: Koeleria brevis, also known as blue wild rye or short hair grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Koeleria brevis is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Koeleria brevis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate various health issues.
